title: Fifa World Cup National Supporter Poster AI
sourceTitle: Fifa World Cup National Supporter Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-cinematic FIFA World Cup 2026 national supporter campaign poster for Spain, red and gold, built around young adult Spanish supporter in a stylish red-and-gold jacket. Subject: young adult Spanish supporter in a stylish red-and-gold jacket stands as the central adult hero supporter, wearing national team outerwear and carrying proud championship energy without changing the fixed sports-poster style. Scene: giant waving Spain flag, abstract Madrid skyline and historic arches fills the background, while roaring stadium, confetti, sunset clouds, volumetric light creates the championship atmosphere and national celebration context. Composition: Fixed low-angle sports magazine cover composition: centered supporter, giant national flag behind the figure, landmark montage blended into the rear field, stadium depth, confetti, bold poster hierarchy, and clean vertical campaign readability. Signature Elements: FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign energy, roaring crowd, thousands of fans waving flags, giant national flag, landmark montage, confetti explosion, sports magazine cover aesthetic, and premium patriotic advertising finish. Style: Premium FIFA World Cup 2026 promotional poster look with photorealistic sports photography, powerful patriotic energy, realistic fabric texture, brushstroke graphic accents, grunge paint splashes, ultra-detailed campaign finish, and award-winning sports advertising polish. Color Palette: National colors from Spain, red and gold dominate the poster, supported by stadium neutrals, flag tones, confetti accents, deep crowd shadows, and vibrant cinematic contrast. Lighting: Dynamic stadium lighting with volumetric light rays, epic cloud glow, rim highlights on the supporter, bright confetti sparkle, and dramatic high-contrast championship atmosphere. Camera: Low-angle hero shot with cinematic sports-photography depth, confident upward scale, readable face, and the flag and landmarks kept large but secondary to the supporter. Typography: SPAIN / ROAD TO GLORY appears as bold brushstroke sports-poster typography, large enough to read and integrated with the national campaign layout. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-cinematic FIFA World Cup 2026 national supporter campaign poster for France, blue white red, built around young adult French supporter in a navy jacket and white scarf. Subject: young adult French supporter in a navy jacket and white scarf stands as the central adult hero supporter, wearing national team outerwear and carrying proud championship energy without changing the fixed sports-poster style. Scene: giant French tricolor, Paris skyline silhouettes and triumphal arch forms fills the background, while night stadium with fireworks, confetti, blue rim light creates the championship atmosphere and national celebration context. Composition: Fixed low-angle sports magazine cover composition: centered supporter, giant national flag behind the figure, landmark montage blended into the rear field, stadium depth, confetti, bold poster hierarchy, and clean vertical campaign readability. Color Palette: National colors from France, blue white red dominate the poster, supported by stadium neutrals, flag tones, confetti accents, deep crowd shadows, and vibrant cinematic contrast. Lighting: Dynamic stadium lighting with volumetric light rays, epic cloud glow, rim highlights on the supporter, bright confetti sparkle, and dramatic high-contrast championship atmosphere. Camera: Low-angle hero shot with cinematic sports-photography depth, confident upward scale, readable face, and the flag and landmarks kept large but secondary to the supporter. Typography: FRANCE / CHASE THE CROWN appears as bold brushstroke sports-poster typography, large enough to read and integrated with the national campaign layout. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
